message:
fix: card deletion now attempts backend delete for all IDs (#5215)

The delete handler skipped backend persistence for cards with prefixed
IDs (demo-, new-, rec-, template-, restored-, ai-). This meant cards
that were later synced to the backend could not be deleted. Remove the
prefix check and silently ignore 404 responses for local-only cards.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
